message:
test(sharding): expand proptest from 4 to 15 properties (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add is_sharded_pane_id consistency, shard-0 non-sharded, encode uniqueness,
consistent hash determinism, RoundRobin/ByDomain/ByAgentType validity,
ShardHealthEntry/Report serde roundtrips, unhealthy_shards filter correctness,
watchdog_warnings count consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
